intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is represented only by the white rabbit anchor; the plant itself is missing.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no botanical growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no botanical growth detected.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: White rabbit anchor present; soil is bare.
plant_audit.P4_Black_Pot: Shared space with P2; no botanical growth detected.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of fungal bloom or crusting.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments observed in the foreground pot (P3/P4 area), serving as a consistent marker throughout the sequence.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Initial state shows a single green sprout in the foreground pot.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-1: The sprout in the foreground pot exhibits gradual postural collapse and chlorosis (yellowing/browning).
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: The sprout has completely withered or been removed; the biome is now entirely devoid of live plant matter.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total failure. The lack of foliage and the disappearance of the initial sprout indicate a failure to thrive, likely due to environmental stress or lack of viable propagation material.
anomalies: Eggshell fragments used as soil amendment/top dressing.
Total absence of expected botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the entire botanical collection. The sequence documents the final decline of a single, unidentified sprout in the foreground pot, which eventually vanished. The pots currently contain only soil and debris (eggshells). The white rabbit anchor remains as the sole occupant of the P3 site. No active growth is present.
